page_metadata.biotools__summary: RetroPath RL performs bio-retrosynthesis using the Monte Carlo Tree Search Reinforcement Learning approach. It is compatible with mono-component reaction rules from RetroRules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RetroPath RL performs bio-retrosynthesis using the Monte Carlo Tree Search Reinforcement Learning approach. It is compatible with mono-component reaction rules from RetroRules.
